negative_prompt_default: text, watermark, logo, signature, blurry, low quality, jpeg artifacts

cards.name: Red Tape
cards.art_prompt: A bureaucratic illustration: a spool of red tape wrapped around a stamped document, paper texture, inked lines, subtle shading, official stamp marks, no text.
cards.notes: Starter example card for the gallery.

cards.name: Audit
cards.rules_text: Apply 1 Exposed to ALL enemies. Gain 4 Block.
cards.art_prompt: A stern-looking stamp and a checklist clipboard over layered paperwork, sepia ink illustration, paper grain, official vibe, no text.

cards.name: Rubber Stamp
cards.rules_text: At the start of your turn, draw 1 and gain 1 Muscle.
cards.art_prompt: A heavy rubber stamp pressed onto paper with a bold circular imprint shape (blank, no letters), ink illustration, paper texture, dramatic lighting, no text.

cards.name: Form 27-B/6
cards.art_prompt: towering stack of identical government forms, rubber stamp, desk lamp casting hard shadows

house_style_positive_default: 1970s editorial illustration style, bold black ink outlines, limited warm color palette, cream and tan backgrounds, muted earth tones, flat cel shading, vintage comic book linework, slightly desaturated colors, retro pulp illustration, bureaucratic office setting, clean graphic composition
house_style_negative_default: photorealistic, 3d render, soft gradients, painterly, watercolor, neon colors, modern digital art, anime, manga, bright saturated colors, glowing effects, fantasy lighting, blur, bokeh, soft focus
color_accent_suffix_default: used sparingly as a graphic highlight against neutral tones
